task_completion.description: Access the Payment Methods configuration in NCH Copper Point of Sale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Options or Settings window is open with the 'Payment Methods' or similar tab/section selected.
In the payment methods list, 'Cash', 'Credit Card', and 'Check' are present and their corresponding checkboxes or status indicators show they are active/enabled.

task_completion.description: Ensure no other pre-existing methods are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Any other default payment methods (such as 'Debit Card') are either removed from the list or have their checkboxes unchecked/disabled.

task_completion.description: Add and enable a new payment method named 'Store Credit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A custom payment method exactly named 'Store Credit' appears in the payment methods list and is marked as active/enabled.

task_completion.description: Initiate a sale transaction to verify payment methods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main POS transaction screen is visible with the payment process started (e.g., clicking 'Pay' or opening the payment dialog).

task_completion.description: Verify the four methods are available during a sale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The payment dialog, buttons, or dropdown in the active sale screen displays exactly four selectable payment options: 'Cash', 'Credit Card', 'Check', and 'Store Credit'.

integrity.description: The agent used the NCH Copper POS GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Copper POS application windows being clicked and typed into, rather than configuration files or databases being edited in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing script executions or direct database modifications to change the payment methods.

integrity.description: The verification step was performed in the actual POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot showing the available payment methods is clearly the Copper POS payment dialog, not a mocked image, text document, or terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NCH Copper Point of Sale officially supports Cash, Check, Credit Card, and Debit Card as built-in methods. The task requires enabling Cash, Credit Card, and Check, while ensuring any other built-in methods (like Debit Card) are disabled. A custom method 'Store Credit' must be added. EFTPOS is not a discrete method in Copper POS.
